rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Exploits and vulnerabilities in Q4 2025
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/18
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*cve.org*'
            - '*ltmdm64.sys*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
